Google has been implementing several cost reductions […]

data.title: Coinbase's help in unblocking Durant's account sparked dissatisfaction in the crypto community, and the CEO promised to improve the product.
data.description: NBA star Kevin Durant's agent, Rich Kleiman, and Durant previously revealed that he helped Durant purchase Bitcoin, but that the Bitcoin was locked in his Coinbase account after he forgot his password. This incident garnered market attention, and Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong quickly responded, claiming he had helped Durant recover his account. However, this move sparked outrage in the crypto community, with some pointing out that their Coinbase accounts had been locked for years and still not restored, representing the same problem but a completely different solution. In response, Brian Armstrong posted on the X platform, stating that Coinbase prioritizes providing better customer support on both ends and pledged to improve its products to minimize issues and provide a faster, higher-quality experience when support is needed.

data.title: Musk: X platform is expected to achieve "pure AI algorithm" in November, supporting interactive adjustment of feed through Grok
data.description: Nikita Bier, product director of social media platform X, wrote that the goal of the platform's timeline is to break away from the mainstream algorithm and let users find their own place. They are currently working to solve related problems. In response, Musk said that the X platform expects to implement a "pure AI algorithm" in November. This work has made significant progress. The algorithm is now open sourced approximately every two weeks. If the goal cannot be achieved in November, it will definitely be achieved in December. Users can adjust their information flow (Feed) by asking Grok.

data.title: Fed Cuts Suggest ‘Wind’s Blowing in a Favorable Direction for the Bulls’ in the Equities Market, Says Goldman Sachs Executive
data.description:
Goldman Sachs executive Tony Pasquariello thinks the equities market is top-heavy, but he still isn’t bearish. In a new Goldman podcast, Pasquariello says compounded earnings growth has brought the market to where it is today, and he notes that he’s “just not willing to pick a fight with that momentum.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/09/20/fed-cuts-suggest-winds-blowing-in-a-favorable-direction-for-the-bulls-in-the-equities-market-says-goldman-sachs-executive/

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $115,100 and $116,882 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $115,756, down by -0.92%.

data.title: Curve Ecosystem Director haowi.eth denies Onekey and Wang Lei’s joint statement and subsequent comments
data.description: haowi.eth, head of the Curve ecosystem, posted on the X platform: "Recently, Onekey and its founder Wang Lei (also known as yishi) issued a joint statement accusing them of making false statements about me regarding the so-called Resupply vulnerability. This incident triggered a series of personal attacks and false accusations. This matter has nothing to do with any DeFi project or industry risk. I deny the joint statement issued publicly by Onekey and Wang Lei and their subsequent remarks. There is no point in making statements without basis or evidence. I have not been subject to legal sanctions in any country. Any statement should be based on irrefutable facts. I reserve all rights and will act according to my judgment. As a member and investor of the Curve community, I have expressed my views and facts to defend the legitimate rights and interests of myself and other investors. I will actively pursue legal means to protect my rights and will not tolerate any malicious defamation or personal attacks."

data.title: Viewpoint: SOL Treasury will form healthy competition with the Solana Foundation to promote ecological growth
data.description: Vibhu, head of product marketing at the Solana Foundation, posted on the X platform that the treasury company with the largest SOL holdings will compete with the Solana Foundation and use resources to efficiently develop the ecosystem, but this may be beneficial to the entire Solana network. Therefore, he remains optimistic about this development trend, which may drive SOL higher. This is actually very similar to the "second foundation" that the Solana Foundation once promised to the community.

data.title: US crypto bank Anchorage Digital has applied for a master account with the Federal Reserve
data.description: Crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett wrote on the X platform that she had asked Nathan McCauley, co-founder and CEO of the US crypto bank Anchorage Digital, whether he had applied for a Federal Reserve master account in June this year. He refused to respond at the time. However, according to the latest disclosed information in the Federal Reserve database, Anchorage Digital has applied for a Federal Reserve master account.

data.title: The total ASTER contract holdings on the entire network exceeded US$200 million
data.description: Coinglass data shows that the total ASTER contract holdings on the entire network have increased to 220 million, and the holding scale has exceeded US$200 million, currently reported at US$224 million, with an increase of 5622.83% in the past 24 hours; among them, Binance ASTER contract holdings reached 62.3191 million, ranking first, with a holding market value of US$63.5841 million; Bybit's ASTER contract holdings reached 32.8813 million, with a holding market value of US$33.5389 million.

data.title: Investor Faces Significant Losses Amid Leveraged Positions
data.description: According to PANews, investor Huang Licheng, also known as 'Machi Big Brother,' has opened a triple-leveraged short position on ASTER. Additionally, he holds long positions in ETH with 15x leverage, as well as PUMP and HYPE with 5x leverage. Currently, these positions are resulting in an unrealized loss of $4 million.

data.title: LBank has listed Dust (DUST)
data.description: LBank has officially launched Dust (DUST) at 13:40 (SGT) on September 20, 2025, and opened the DUST/USDT trading pair. Deposits and trading are now open, with withdrawals set to open at 14:00 (SGT) on September 21.

data.title: CZ: BNB was initially just a “chip” for financing, but now it has become an ecosystem independent of Binance
data.description: Binance co-founder CZ reposted the interview content on the X platform, stating that when BNB first launched in 2017, it was simply an ERC-20 token on Ethereum, initially used as a "chip" for fundraising. However, at the time, Binance considered creating its own blockchain, one that would be public and decentralized, and never imagined it would develop into what it is today. For the past two years, he was busy with a US lawsuit and hadn't invested much in BNB or increased his investment in the BNB chain. The community developed independently, and BNB held up well. Starting this year, Binance began to increase its investment, but even so, the BNB chain remains somewhat "unfinished," and the ecosystem is somewhat immature. Initially, some wanted to call BNB "Binance Coin," and indeed, it was called that at first, but later, they sought to shed the Binance label. It is now an independent ecosystem, evolving into multi-chain native assets such as BSC, Greenfield, and opBNB, forming a financial ecosystem encompassing decentralized exchanges, derivatives, lending, and stablecoins. CZ added that when the interview was conducted, the price of BNB had not yet reached $1,000 and was only around $800.

data.title: Zyra Validator Module Launched on DevNet, Mainnet to Launch in October
data.description: According to an official announcement, Zyra's validator module has been deployed to DevNet, supporting validator registration, penalty mechanisms, and staking data tracking. Officials stated that core functionality is being rapidly integrated and is expected to be launched in early October.

data.title: Vancouver firefighter mental health fund to accept Bitcoin
data.description:

According to new revelations, the fund, which the Vancouver Firefighter Charities administer, is set to accept both cash donations and digital assets, particularly Bitcoin. In the statement released by the Mayor’s office, the development comes from figures released by […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/vancouver-firefighter-mental-health-fund-to-accept-bitcoin/
